title: Pagan (disambiguation) - Wikipedia
body: Look up pagan in Wiktionary, the free dictionary. A pagan is an adherent of paganism. Pagan may also refer to: Places [ edit ] Bagan , a city in Myanmar, also known as Pagan Pagan kingdom , 849–1287, Burmese Empire Battle of Pagan in 1287, Mongol defeat of Pagan Kingdom Pagan (island) , in the Marianas archipelago People [ edit ] Pagan (name) , people with the given name (first name) Pagan Pagan (chancellor) , first chancellor of the Kingdom of Jerusalem Ángel Pagán (born 1981), Puerto Rican baseball player Blaise Francois Pagan (1603–1665), French military engineer and fortification theorician Dave Pagan (born 1949), Canadian baseball player Denis Pagan (born 1947), Australian rules football player and coach Emilio Pagán (born 1991), Italian & Puerto Rican baseball pitcher Hugues Pagan (born 1947), French detective writer Isabel Pagan (c. 1740 – 1821), Scottish poet José Pagán (1935–2011), Puerto Rican baseball player Maria Pagan (contemporary), official at the Office of the United States Trade Representative María Vega Pagán (born 1977), Puerto Rican politician Michael J. Pagan (born 1985), American actor Groups [ edit ] Pagan's Motorcycle Club , in Prince George's County, Maryland, US Entertainment [ edit ] Music [ edit ] Pagan metal , a subgenres of Heavy metal music Pagan (album) , the 6th album by Celtic metal band Cruachan Pagan Records , a record label Films [ edit ] The Pagan , 1929 film P.A.G.A.N. (People Against Goodness And Normalcy), a fictional organization in the 1987 parody film Dragnet Video games [ edit ] Ultima VIII: Pagan , 1994 videogame Order of the Vine , a druidic faction in the Thief video game series See also [ edit ] Pagans (disambiguation) Heathen (disambiguation) Topics referred to by the same term This disambiguation page lists articles associated with the title Pagan . If an internal link incorrectly led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article.
